scripts.build:prod: ng build --configuration production --base-href='/golgari-game-day/' && npm run flatten-build
scripts.flatten-build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); if(fs.existsSync('docs/browser')){const files=fs.readdirSync('docs/browser',{withFileTypes:true}); files.forEach(f=>{const src=path.join('docs/browser',f.name), dest=path.join('docs',f.name); if(f.isDirectory()){fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true})}else{fs.copyFileSync(src,dest)}}); fs.rmSync('docs/browser',{recursive:true})}"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && npx gh-pages -d docs
